## Expected vs actual

- **Expected:** what should have happened.
- **Actual:** what did.

## Environment

## Logs

If the bug touches the server side (auth, generate, R2 proxy), paste
the relevant Vercel function log lines. Strip any secrets or signed
URL signatures before posting.

paste logs here

## Screenshots

If the bug is visual or about canvas state, drop screenshots here.
